ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the security the data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the security */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the security during the period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the security during the period */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the security */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the security */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the financial data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality or reliability of the data */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount for the period */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio for the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the security */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the security */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the security is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the security */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the security */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the security is traded */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the security */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the security's data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial data point */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period used in the calculation */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the technical indicator (e.g., MA, MACD) */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used to calculate the indicator */,
  "calculation_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the indicator was calculated */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plots" (
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plot data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial data point */,
  "plot_name" TEXT /* Name of the plot */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the plot data point */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the plot (e.g., Line, Bar) */,
  "plot_type" TEXT /* Type of the plot (e.g., line, bar, candlestick) */,
  "plot_title" TEXT /* Title of the plot */,
  "plot_description" TEXT /* Description of the plot */,
  "plot_creation_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the plot was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plots_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, disabled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data or plot */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data being accessed */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plot being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data or plot was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
